hero.headline: About SunEnergy Pro
hero.description: 12 years of solar expertise. 15,000+ happy customers. A commitment to clean energy.

story.title: Our Story
story.subtitle: How we became Northern California's most trusted solar installer
story.paragraph_1: Founded in 2014, SunEnergy Pro started with a simple mission: make solar energy accessible to everyone. What began as a small team of passionate solar enthusiasts has grown into a full-service solar company trusted by thousands of homeowners and businesses.
story.paragraph_2: We've installed over 15,000 solar systems, saved our customers over $150 million in energy costs, and maintained a 97% customer satisfaction rating. Our success is built on our commitment to quality, transparency, and exceptional customer service.
story.paragraph_3: Today, we're proud to be one of Northern California's leading solar installers, recognized for our expertise, professionalism, and dedication to helping our community transition to clean, renewable energy.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To empower homeowners and businesses to harness the sun's energy, reduce their environmental footprint, and achieve long-term energy independence through premium solar solutions.

team.title: Meet Our Team
team.description: Expert solar installers and designers dedicated to your success

team_member_2.name: Sarah Johnson
team_member_2.bio: NABCEP certified with 15+ years of solar installation expertise. Sarah ensures every project exceeds expectations.

hero.headline: Frequently Asked Questions
hero.description: Have questions about solar? We've got answers.

question_1.question: How much can I save with solar?
question_1.answer: Savings depend on your location, roof condition, and current energy usage. Most customers save $8,000-$20,000 over 25 years. Use our calculator for a personalized estimate.

question_2.question: What's the installation timeline?
question_2.answer: From consultation to activation typically takes 4-8 weeks, depending on permits and weather. We'll give you a specific timeline during your consultation.

question_3.question: Do I need batteries for my solar system?
question_3.answer: Not required for grid-tied systems. Batteries add cost but provide backup power during outages. We can design a system with or without batteries based on your needs.

question_4.question: What's included in your warranty?
question_4.answer: We offer 25-year equipment warranties, 10-year workmanship warranties, and full insurance coverage. Your system is protected.

question_5.question: Can I add more panels later?
question_5.answer: Yes! Most systems are designed to expand. We can add panels in the future if your needs change.

faq.no_results_message: No matching questions found. Contact us for help.
